chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-93 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.10862/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.10863/2025 (Return of surety) 16.12.2025 Mr.Dheeraj Kumar, Advocate for applicant/surety Mr.Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G (present in court in other matters, waives notice) ********* 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, applicant/surety seeks release of the surety furnished by him in the present matter. It is contended that vide Order dated 23.05.2016, the applicant/accused Muhammad Ayoob was granted bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present surety. It is further contended that vide Judgment dated 23.04.2025, the Criminal Revision Application was allowed and the applicant/accused was acquitted, as such, the surety furnished before this Court is no longer required, although the judgment is silent with respect to the discharge of surety, no purpose will be served in keeping in place a surety where the accused is acquitted. Learned D.P.G after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
